secretaryOfState.agency: New York Department of State Division of Corporations

hours.regular: Division of Corporations counter service Monday-Friday 9:00 a.m.-4:30 p.m.; e-Statement Filing Service Monday-Friday 6:00 a.m.-7:30 p.m., except legal holidays.

physicalAddresses.label: Division of Corporations
physicalAddresses.street: One Commerce Plaza, 99 Washington Avenue, 6th Floor

mailingAddress.street: Division of Corporations, State Records and Uniform Commercial Code, One Commerce Plaza, 99 Washington Avenue

renewals.notes: Domestic and foreign LLCs file a $9 Biennial Statement every two years during the calendar month in which the Articles of Organization or Application for Authority was filed.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC Articles of Organization filing fee is $200.
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: LLC Reservation of Name filing fee is $20.

sources.name: Forming a Limited Liability Company in New York
